+[  Left Group  ]-----------------+
|                                 |
|         +----------+            |
|         |  Node A  |            |
|         +-----+----+            |
|               |                 |
|       +-------+-------+         |
|       |               |         |
|       |               |         |
|      +[  Right Group  ]-------+ |
|      ||               |       | |
|      |v               v       | |
| +----------+    +----------+  | |
| |  Node B  |    |  Node C  |  | |
| +----++----+    +-----+----+  | |
|      ||               |       | |
|      ||               |       | |
|      |+-------+-------+       | |
|      |        |               | |
|      |        v               | |
|      |  +----------+          | |
|      |  |  Node D  |          | |
|      |  +----------+          | |
|      |                        | |
|      |                        | |
|      +------------------------+ |
|                                 |
+---------------------------------+
